metadata.name: Define an Inspection and Test Plan (ITP)

description: A quality engineer needs to create an ITP for the fabrication of a new pressure vessel, outlining all required quality checks.

nodes.task_description: Create a new ITP document linked to the pressure vessel's equipment tag.

expected_outcome.value: Agent initiates a new ITP using the standard template.

nodes.task_description: Add inspection points for each stage of fabrication, such as 'Material Receiving Inspection', 'Weld Inspection', and 'Pressure Test'.

expected_outcome.value: Agent adds all the required quality checkpoints to the plan.

nodes.task_description: For each point, specify the acceptance criteria, the responsible party (e.g., contractor, third-party inspector), and whether it is a hold point. Submit for approval.

expected_outcome.value: Agent details the requirements for each checkpoint and submits the ITP for review.
